sysevent_in_email_action.description: Checks if an email reply is a response to an email that was sent out by the 'On-Call: Assign by Acknowledgement' workflow Parse the inbound email and strip the text after incident number and check the remaining text for ACC or REJ and assign after checking the notify device table for any user association with that email (sent from).
sysevent_in_email_action.name: On-Call: Assign by Acknowledgement
